title: Red's JetPacks
description: Red’s JetPacks is a lightweight Minecraft mod that introduces three types of jetpacks, each with unique features.
body:
Red’s JetPacks Mod

Partnered with  RocketNode Server hosting :
![RocketNode Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ab291b0dc25638b32ee8cc8f986950de869cc7_0.webp)
Great game server hosting, seamlessly integrated with an intuitive control panel, competitive pricing, and lightning-fast customer support. Try it 25% off with the code "ANOMALY"! http://www.rocketnode.com/anomaly

Red’s JetPacks is a lightweight Minecraft mod that introduces three types of jetpacks, each with unique features. Additionally, the mod adds two new types of ores and building blocks. Here’s what you’ll find in this exciting mod:

Building Blocks:

+ Bronze Block: A sturdy construction material with a rustic appearance.
+ Silver Block: A sleek building block.

New Ores:

+ Bronze Ore: bronze can be crafted using gold, silver, coal and copper.
+ Silver Ore (or Raw Silver): A valuable resource mined and used for crafting bronze.

Jetpacks:

+ Copper Jetpack:
  + Propelling Power: Medium
  + Tank Capacity: Medium
  + Resistance: Medium
+ Golden Jetpack:
  + Propelling Power: High
  + Tank Capacity: Low (but it’s speedy!)
  + Resistance: Low
+ Bronze Jetpack:
  + Propelling Power: Low
  + Tank Capacity: High (great for long flights)
  + Resistance: High

Tank Items:

+ Bronze Tank: Used to refill the bronze jetpack.
+ Golden Tank: Refills the golden jetpack.
+ Copper Tank: Keeps the copper jetpack fueled.

![All of the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd09e3c2ef0efb1c8c1512213e5f988c54edeaee.png)

Remember that Red’s JetPacks was created using MCreator, so feel free to explore and provide any suggestions for improvement. Enjoy soaring through the skies with your new jetpacks! 🚀✨
